description_long: This sculpture depicts three human figures arranged on a rectangular stone base. At the center stands a crowned woman in flowing robes, her hands extended forward, flanked by a kneeling man on her right and a child on her left. The man appears to be offering or receiving an object from the woman, while the child is positioned lower, gazing upward. The figures are intricately detailed, with realistic drapery and expressive postures, suggesting a narrative or ceremonial scene. The entire composition is carved from a pale, marble-like stone, with subtle variations in color and texture. The base features some inscriptions or reliefs, adding to the historical or commemorative character of the piece.
description: A detailed marble sculpture of a crowned woman flanked by a kneeling man and a child, all arranged on a rectangular stone base. The figures are lifelike and appear to be engaged in a ceremonial or narrative moment.
description_view_0: Side view showing the crowned woman in profile, with the kneeling man and child visible in partial profile; the drapery and layered arrangement of the figures are prominent.
description_view_1: Frontal view displaying all three figures clearly: the crowned woman at the center, the kneeling man to her right, and the child to her left, with the base and inscriptions visible.
description_view_2: Rear side view focusing on the backs of the figures, especially the man and the woman, with the child partially visible; the flowing robes and hair details are evident.
description_view_3: Back view showing the rear of all three figures, highlighting the drapery and the overall composition from behind.
attribute_subject_matter: three human figures in a ceremonial or narrative scene
attribute_location_context: The sculpture appears to be designed for outdoor or public urban settings, such as a plaza or park, based on its stone base and commemorative style.
